CustomField.description: Use this field to report on applicant demographics and/or track eligibility requirements related to residency. Tip: Edit this help text to describe how your program defines and collects this information.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Use this field to report on applicant demographics and/or track eligibility requirements related to residency.
Tip: Edit this help text to describe how your program defines and collects this information.
CustomField.label: Year Moved to County
